calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-28-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as assigned by Dept. 501 this day for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR Gordon Aiavao #11216.
Sean Makarin, Esq. appeared for and with plaintiff TNDC and property manager Margo Rodriguez, was sworn and testified.
Anthony Prince, Esq. as counsel of record for defendant Dale Fleming, not present.
The Court denied Mr. Prince's request to renew his oral request for a short trial continuance, which was previously denied by Judge Quidachay in Dept. 501 this morning.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at:
55 Mason Street, Apt. 513, San Francisco, CA 94102
Rental agreement is forfeited.
Past due rents $2,612.28
Attorney's Fee $560.00
Cost is waived, for a total judgment in the amount of $3,172.28
Judgment was submitted to and signed in open Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-17-2017 Continued To Aug-28-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Continued To Aug-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Aug-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 11
Judge Pro Tem: Neil Bardack, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood is present. Represented by Gladys Largaespada.
Attorney Sean Makarin for the plaintiff.
Defendant dale W. Fleming is present.
Attorney Anthony Prince appearing for defendants in limited full scope.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was a medical incident and all parties stipulate to conference via telephone and upon approval of the Judge Pro Tem. The trial date of August 7, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
